shots.title: PR metadata signal parser
shots.notes: Created packages/core/src/pr-signals.ts (~130 lines). Types: PRPlatform, PRReviewDecision, PRSignal. Functions: buildGhCommand, parsePRJson, emptyPRSignal. Internal helpers: countReviewCycles, countChangeRequests, computeTimeToMerge, extractStatusChecks, normalizeReviewDecision. Pure parser pattern following ci-signals.ts. 14 tests.

shots.title: Review-based shot classification
shots.notes: Added pr?: PRSignal to CombinedSignals. PR rules in classifyShotFromSignals: change_request_count >= 2 → missed_right (0.7 confidence), high comment density (>3/file) + change request → green (0.8), clean PR boosts in_the_hole reasoning. Updated enrichMissClassification with PR source counting. All 83 existing advisor tests still pass. 13 new tests.

shots.title: CI status integration from PR
shots.notes: Added mergePRChecksWithCI (derives CI from PR checks, detects retry scenario) and detectCheckRetries. CLI: --pr=<number> flag on auto-card with execSync + try/catch for graceful degradation. PR signal metadata in output JSON. 9 new tests.

shots.title: MCP + briefing + docs
shots.notes: MCP registry: 4 PR signal entries (parsePRJson, buildGhCommand, mergePRChecksWithCI, emptyPRSignal). SLOPE_TYPES: PRPlatform, PRReviewDecision, PRSignal, CombinedSignals update. Briefing: PR Context section with review decision, cycles, checks, comment density, time-to-merge. Plugin template: docs/templates/pr-signal-plugin.json. 12 tests.

conditions.description: Multi-package feature — new signal source threading through core types, advisor logic, CLI integration, MCP registry, and briefing

nutrition.description: Clean build + all 901 tests pass (679 core + 36 store + 132 CLI + 54 MCP) after each commit
4 focused commits, one per ticket in sequence. Build + targeted test run after each before committing.
Followed ci-signals.ts pure-parser pattern for pr-signals.ts. CombinedSignals optional pr field mirrors optional ci field. Plan line references anchored on code context.
All existing 853 tests continue to pass. 48 new tests added across 4 test files. Zero regressions.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Very smooth. The plan was precise enough that implementation was mechanical — each ticket mapped cleanly to files and test suites. The ci-signals.ts pattern made pr-signals.ts straightforward. No hazards encountered.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: PR signals flow: CLI runs `gh pr view --json` → parsePRJson() → feeds into classifyShotFromSignals via pr field + mergePRChecksWithCI for CI enrichment. The PRSignal type is the contract — see docs/templates/pr-signal-plugin.json for the schema. emptyPRSignal() is exported (unlike emptyCISignal) because MCP needs it for safe defaults.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: Nothing surprising — the plan was well-reviewed and the codebase patterns are mature. The comment density calculation (comments/files > 3) as a complexity signal is a simple but effective heuristic. The retry detection (PR checks failed but CI now passes) is a clever way to infer retries without parsing individual check re-runs.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: The signal source matrix is now complete: git traces + CI output + PR metadata. Next opportunities: auto-card could auto-detect the latest merged PR for the branch, or the plugin system could support custom signal parsers for GitLab/Bitbucket using the pr-signal-plugin.json contract.

yardage_book_updates: packages/core/src/pr-signals.ts: New file — PR signal parser (buildGhCommand, parsePRJson, emptyPRSignal, mergePRChecksWithCI, detectCheckRetries)
packages/core/src/advisor.ts: CombinedSignals.pr, PR rules in classifyShotFromSignals, enrichMissClassification with PR source
packages/cli/src/commands/auto-card.ts: --pr flag with gh subprocess + graceful degradation
packages/core/src/briefing.ts: PR Context section in formatBriefing
packages/mcp-tools/src/registry.ts: 4 PR signal entries + SLOPE_TYPES update
docs/templates/pr-signal-plugin.json: JSON schema for cross-platform PR signal plugins
course_management_notes: 4 tickets, 4 in_the_hole — zero hazards, zero regressions
Pure-parser pattern (pr-signals.ts) keeps I/O at CLI boundary — clean separation
Backward-compatible: pr is optional everywhere, existing behavior unchanged when absent
Signal source matrix now complete: git traces + CI output + PR metadata
